title: Gendos Army
wikitext:
[]: Gendo's Army             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Wed Jul 30, 2014 10:02 am Couldn't Gendo make an army of Rei's clones? They were a replacement in case of death . But wouldn't be useful to use the clones for a army?

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Wed Jul 30, 2014 10:24 am But wouldn't one have to build a new Eva for each new Rei? That doesn't sound practical, very time consuming..

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Jul 30, 2014 10:35 am But see his mass-production facility in Q ! Seele's MPEs in NGE had plugs based on Kaworu, so maybe Gendou's in Final will be based on Rei. Of course, you have to get clone armies right - one possible pitfall is demonstrated in FMA Brotherhood .

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Wed Jul 30, 2014 11:55 am pwhodges wrote: But see his mass-production facility in Q ! Seele's MPEs in NGE had plugs based on Kaworu, so maybe Gendou's in Final will be based on Rei. Of course, you have to get clone armies right - one possible pitfall is demonstrated in FMA Brotherhood .

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Jul 30, 2014 2:15 pm A clone army of Reis is impossible in NGE: without a soul, a being can't sustain itself outside of a vat of LCL, if they get out they tang. In Rebuild we don't know the status of Rei Q's soul (artificial one, "remote", soulless although her display of emotions hints to the contrary) to have an answer. Thomas68 wrote: WILLE is outnumbered and one of their two MAIN pilots situation is unknown and the other one is taking a catatonic body with her. If Gendo try to build an army of Rei's clones the first thing he'll do is take WILLE out of the game beacuse probably he won't have another chance to take WILLE down.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Jul 30, 2014 3:47 pm If the next flick doesn't open with Mari singlehandedly repulsing a horde of Rei-types trying to board the Wunder I'm going to be disappointed.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Wed Jul 30, 2014 4:44 pm ElMariachi wrote: As for the MP-Evas army, if the trailer told the truth, it will probably take him a lot of time before actually building that army, so far we only saw transport wagons, weapon cases and hanging arms that could just be the "rubber suits", so WILLE might have some time left. But yes, Gendo will probably use that army to destroy WILLE, now that he doesn't need them anymore (unless he does need them for yet another part of his plans)

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Jul 30, 2014 5:15 pm Even then that's a lot of Evas to build, and I doubt they will all be ready in a couple of days, we're talking about thousands of Evas here!

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Thu Jul 31, 2014 6:17 pm All I can is of this. Which, I can totally see a use for, in Gendou's case.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Thu Jul 31, 2014 6:50 pm I've got a theory, what if time flows differently in the Room of Guf? Like a couple months here is like a decade in there? Gendo could create an Army dozens of times bigger than Willes in a quarter of the time. Catching them off guard.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Thu Jul 31, 2014 7:00 pm Ray wrote: I've got a theory, what if time flows differently in the Room of Guf? Like a couple months here is like a decade in there? Gendo could create an Army dozens of times bigger than Willes in a quarter of the time. Catching them off guard.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Jul 31, 2014 8:21 pm Who's to say we won't see that? The original preview for 3.0 at the end of 2.0 had a shot of multiple Rei's together. In the theatrical release of 3.0 there is a shot of Evangelion pilot seats being moved along a conveyer belt in the automated NERV remains. In the preview for Final we see Evangelion Unit 2+8 fighting a horde of mass-produced Evas. Yeah, most likely if the MP Evas do show up in Final (I feel it's probably the one given about the movie at this point) they'll be driven by an updated version of the Dummy System. BUT if Anno really wants to make it dark & hit (some) fans where it hurts he could have Gendo put a Rei clone in each & every one of those MP Evas. Each MP Eva that is shot down, cut in half or eviscerated - has a Rei inside.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 31, 2014 8:28 pm That's so sick I could see that happening...though I'm assuming they'd be empty husks a la the giggling soulless NGE tank Reis (remember, 3.0 Rei's soul is "somewhere else"...most likely Rei-2 in Eva-01).

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jul 31, 2014 8:50 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Yeah, most likely if the MP Evas do show up in Final (I feel it's probably the one given about the movie at this point) they'll be driven by an updated version of the Dummy System. BUT if Anno really wants to make it dark & hit (some) fans where it hurts he could have Gendo put a Rei clone in each & every one of those MP Evas. Each MP Eva that is shot down, cut in half or eviscerated - has a Rei inside.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 31, 2014 9:34 pm If memory serves, drafts/ideas/etc from the 2.0 CRC showed this (Dummy System = Rei) but they scrapped that for the final product.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jul 31, 2014 9:54 pm I wonder why they scrapped it. It seems as though they could have stuck it in Ha or even Q, especially seeing as the latter film is really short comparatively anyway. Especially since the reveal of Rei in a tank was kind of a big one in Ha. I don’t think they’re gonna let the Rei Tank concept go away simply because they didn’t also attach the Dummy System to it yet.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Aug 01, 2014 3:11 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: In the theatrical release of 3.0 there is a shot of Evangelion pilot seats being moved along a conveyer belt in the automated NERV remains.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Fri Aug 01, 2014 11:32 am The movie might not end like EoE, but I just imagine that ravenous MP EVAs scene repeating in the battle against the Eva/Rei army. The inspiration for the topic was the 4.0 preview, but I don't see the EVA 2+8 taking down all those EVAs. I wonder what Anno will do to save WILLE's ass in case of Ray's theory be correct.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Aug 01, 2014 12:42 pm Thomas68 wrote: The movie might not end like EoE, but I just imagine that ravenous MP EVAs scene repeating in the battle against the Eva/Rei army.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Aug 01, 2014 1:31 pm 1000 little Rei's with machine guns and RPG'S fighting an angel and all of them dying a horrible death.. blood, everywhere dead bodies litter the battlefield All is lost
